context: The 1970 Norwegian VG-lista reflected the global transition from the 1960s beat era to singer-songwriter rock. B.J. Thomas topped with his Butch Cassidy film theme, while The Beatles made their final chart appearance before disbanding. Two Norwegian artists — Anita Hegerland and Gro Anita Schønn — appeared in the top 10, showing early signs of a growing domestic scene.

tracks.title: Raindrops Keep Falling on My Head
The House of the Rising Sun
